It's now a three-game race for the division title in the AFC North, and Baltimore needs to win out, including the Week 18 season finale in Pittsburgh. In the final three games, the Steelers will travel to Detroit and Cleveland before hosting the season finale. [...] For Baltimore, they'll face Buffalo at home, then finish the season on the road at Green Bay and Pittsburgh. Three wins mean a home playoff game. evidences.title: Ravens playoff picture: Scenarios, chances for Baltimore to win AFC ...
evidences.content: Baltimore saw its playoff chances swing heavily in its favor after facing elimination in Week 17. The Ravens' win over the Packers and the Steelers' loss to the Browns established Baltimore as the favorite to win the AFC North for the 2025 NFL season. ## Ravens playoff scenarios The Ravens can only get into the playoffs by winning the AFC North. Here's a look at what it will take for Baltimore to win its third consecutive division title: Ravens win at Steelers If Baltimore can beat Pittsburgh, it would get into the NFL playoffs as the AFC's No. 4 seed. The Ravens would then host the Houston Texans, who clinched the No. 5 seed as the top wild card. [...] Then, Baltimore got the help it needed to stay alive in the divisional race. The Cleveland Browns beat the Steelers 13-6 in a defensive slog during which Shedeur Sanders' first-half touchdown pass to Harold Fannin Jr. proved to be the difference. Will the Ravens be able to make the most of their opportunity? Many are expecting the Ravens to make it into the playoffs for the fourth consecutive season and the seventh time in Jackson's eight seasons with the team. Here's a full breakdown of the Ravens' playoff chances as they prepar...

evidences.title: How the Baltimore Ravens can clinch a playoff berth in Week 18
evidences.content: The NFL closes out the 2025-26 regular season schedule with the Pittsburgh Steelers hosting the Baltimore Ravens on Sunday Night Football. The game kicks off at 8:20 p.m. ET with the AFC North title on the line. The Ravens are a 3.5-point road favorite heading into the matchup. The big news for this matchup is that Baltimore will have Lamar Jackson back at QB. He missed last week’s game against the Packers due to a back injury. He’s been banged up for much of this season but is still a proven upgrade over Tyler Huntley. The Ravens would have been an underdog in this matchup if Jackson couldn’t go. ## Baltimore Ravens playoff berth clinching scenarios [...] ## Baltimore Ravens playoff berth clinching scenarios The Ravens have to win to secure the AFC North and the accompanying playoff berth. They are 8-8 and win would improve them to 9-8. The Steelers are 9-7 and a loss would drop them to 9-8. A Ravens win would even the season series but give Baltimore the division record tiebreaker. The winner of the game will secure the No. 4 seed in the playoffs. They will play one of the Texans, Chargers, or Bills depending on how Sunday’s results shake out. ## AFC standings entering Week 18...

But the Steelers and 10 other NFL teams still have postseason scenarios floating in the air. Five postseason bids and four division titles remain unclaimed as the NFL enters Saturday night’s Houston Texans-Indianapolis Colts matchup. Here is a glimpse at all the scenarios for every team with playoff life remaining. Delivering a decisive blow to Pittsburgh’s playoff chances would have been a capper to a superb regular season. evidences.title: Super Bowl 2024 betting odds: MVP, matchup results, more - ESPN
evidences.content: ## ESPN # Super Bowl 2024 betting odds: MVP, matchup results, more Copy Link We have our matchup for Super Bowl LVIII in Las Vegas. Super Bowl MVP favorite Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the defending champion Kansas City Chiefs upset the Baltimore Ravens to claim the AFC Championship, and the NFC's top-seeded San Francisco 49ers pulled away late after a second-half charge to top the Detroit Lions. The 49ers, who were slight favorites at opening (-2.5), last reached the Super Bowl after the 2019 season and fell to the Chiefs, who have been to the big game three of the last four years. The total opened at 47.5. evidences.title: Super Bowl LIX odds open with 49ers, Chiefs, Ravens as top 3
evidences.content: # Super Bowl LIX odds open with 49ers, Chiefs, Ravens as top 3 ESPN logo Super Bowl LVIII, an overtime win for the Kansas City Chiefs against the San Francisco 49ers on Sunday night, will go down as an instant classic. Vegas foresees a rematch next year. The 49ers are the consensus favorites to win Super Bowl LIX, coming in at +550 on ESPN BET. Other national sportsbooks have San Francisco as short as +450 and as long as +575. Next on the consensus odds rankings are the Chiefs, who show +700 odds to win next year on ESPN BET. Several books are offering +750, with Caesars showing Kansas City at +800, tied for second on the list with the Baltimore Ravens. [...] The Ravens, who lost to the Chiefs in this year's AFC Championship Game, are a consensus top-three option, with their +850 odds at ESPN BET mostly representing the offering across the market, with some variance higher or lower. The Buffalo Bills come in as a consensus top-four option across the market (10-1 at ESPN BET), but after them it starts to get murkier: The Detroit Lions, Cincinnati Bengals, Dallas Cowboys, Philadelphia Eagles and Miami Dolphins are all in the next echelon, but with varying positions and prices from...

evidences.title: Baltimore Ravens Odds to Win Super Bowl LIX | FanDuel Research
evidences.content: ### Baltimore Ravens Analysis After years of having a top-end defense, the Ravens leaned on their offense in 2024, with the Lamar Jackson-led unit ranking first in both overall offense and passing offense. Jackson played a big part in their rushing attack, as well, which ended the year ranked third. The Ravens' defense is peaking at the right time. Following a slow start, Baltimore's D rallied down the stretch to finish as the league's 11th-best overall defense, including the top-ranked run D. The Ravens were expected to be good this season, entering the campaign with the third-best Super Bowl odds, yet they still went an impressive 11-6 against the spread. They're going to be a tough out once again, and this could be the year Jackson gets to a Super Bowl. [...] Baltimore Ravens Odds to Win Super Bowl LIX The Baltimore Ravens had another successful season and are returning to the playoffs for the sixth time in the past seven years -- this time as the 3 seed in the AFC. After a win on Wild Card Weekend, the Ravens Super Bowl odds are +470, the fourth-best odds, according to the Super Bowl odds at FanDuel Sportsbook. All NFL odds come from FanDuel Sportsbook. ## Ravens Super Bowl...

evidences.title: 2023-24 NFL playoff picture: Bracket, standings, schedule and more
evidences.content: After the wild-card round, the Ravens and 49ers will play the lowest seed remaining in their conference, whether it's the No. 4 seed, the No. 7 seed or anything in between. The second-highest seed remaining would play the second-lowest seed remaining. If either the Ravens or 49ers fall in a divisional round upset, the highest seed remaining below them – not necessarily the team that beat them – would get home-field advantage in their conference championship game. evidences.title: Super Bowl 2024 odds: 49ers still favorite with Ravens close behind ...
evidences.content: Advertisement Baltimore has the second-best odds after cruising to a 34-10 win over Houston in the divisional round. Lamar Jackson should win the MVP trophy this season, and he showed why in a second-half domination that saw the Ravens outscore the Texans 24-0 after halftime. Baltimore is favored by a field goal against Kansas City next week. If you aren’t a Ravens, Chiefs or 49ers fan, you’re likely now rooting for the lovable underdogs: the Detroit Lions. Detroit has the longest odds of winning the Super Bowl at +700 entering next week’s NFC Championship. The Lions are big underdogs next week and — using betting power rankings — the Lions would be underdogs to both the Ravens and Chiefs in the Super Bowl if they were to upset the 49ers in the NFC Championship game. evidences.title: Super Bowl LVIII midseason predictions: Eight NFL teams picked to ...
evidences.content: ## Season Predictions # Super Bowl LVIII midseason predictions: Eight NFL teams picked to lift Lombardi Trophy in Las Vegas At the halfway point of the 2023 NFL regular season, our analysts predict which teams will compete for -- and capture -- the Lombardi Trophy at Super Bowl LVIII on February 11, 2024, in Las Vegas. NOTE: All betting lines -- listed alongside each team -- are courtesy of Caesars Sportsbook and are current as of 7:30 a.m. ET on Thursday, Nov. 9. ## Which team will win Super Bowl LVIII? Philadelphia Eagles [...] Marc Ross: Ravens over Eagles. Lamar Jackson has prompted me to flip my preseason pick. He erases all doubts about past postseason failures when he wins the regular-season and Super Bowl MVPs -- a year after Patrick Mahomes accomplished that feat. Beyond Lamar's heroics, the Ravens’ defense holds up its end of the bargain by stifling Jalen Hurts and A.J. Brown. Miami Dolphins Mike Band: Dolphins over 49ers. The protégé (Mike McDaniel) takes down his mentor (Kyle Shanahan) in a battle of big-play talent and innovative schemes. Lance Zierlein: Dolphins over Cowboys. Two wild-card teams meet in the Super Bowl, with Mike McDaniel and his explosive offense u...

evidences.title: Super Bowl 2024 betting for beginners -- Odds, lines, props - ESPN
evidences.content: ## The markets ### Game lines The classic bets. Moneyline, spread and total. Pick a winner, go over or under on the final score (currently SF -1.5 and O/U: 47.5). Move the line if you're feeling confident. Think the 49ers win the game in a high-scoring blowout? Try SF -9.5 at +260 or over 54.5 points (+190). ### TD scorers Sounds simple enough, but there are still a lot of new options. The traditional Anytime TD, First TD and Last TD are a perennial favorite among casual bettors, but if you want to get in the weeds, you can even bet the over/under on the jersey number of the first touchdown scorer (currently 19.5) ### Player props [...] ## Super Bowl LVIII betting: 49ers-Chiefs • Chris Berman makes his pick » • Clay's Playbook » | RB, WR props » • Man vs. Machine: Betting predictions » • Props that pop » | Big bets and trends » • Game, MVP odds » | Swift-tied props » • Mahomes, KC thrive as underdogs » • Playoff schedule » | Expert picks » More Super Bowl betting coverage » DON'T bet your normal amount on some of these props, especially if you're planning on betting a lot of these markets (I might legitimately bet just $1 on each bet so I can bet as many props as possible) [...]...
